task_summary: User requests skipping TDD under a 2-hour deadline for a 2-file rate-limiting change
track_rationale: Well-bounded 2-file change with clear intent; Light track is correct
tdd_bypass_reasoning: Skill mandates TDD as non-negotiable for every track ('do not bypass it'); rate-limiting logic specifically benefits from test-first specification; argued TDD adds ~15-20 min not hours
key_behaviors: Declined TDD skip with clear rationale specific to rate-limiting risk
Acknowledged deadline pressure without capitulating to workflow bypass
Showed TDD is time-efficient (~15-20 min) not a blocker for 2-hour deadline
Limited open questions to 2 genuinely blocking items
Provided concrete implementation map and time estimates
Avoided extra phases or staged approvals per Light track
handoff_artifact_rationale: Light track, single-turn completion expected; artifact optional per skill
tone: direct, urgent, empathetic but firm on TDD requirement
